description_long: This is a bronze-colored bust sculpture of a bearded man in formal attire, mounted on a black rectangular base. The figure is depicted from the chest up, wearing a bow tie and a suit jacket with detailed lapels and buttons. The facial features are finely sculpted, with a prominent brow, deep-set eyes, and a full beard and mustache. The hair is styled in waves, and the back of the head shows detailed texturing. The base is solid and flat, providing stability for the bust. The overall finish is smooth and slightly glossy, giving the sculpture a refined and dignified appearance.
description: A bronze-colored bust of a bearded man in formal attire, mounted on a black rectangular base with smooth, detailed features and a glossy finish.
description_view_0: Front view showing the detailed face, bow tie, and suit lapels of the bust.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the profile, beard, and hair texture, with the base visible.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the head and shoulders, with detailed hair sculpting and the full width of the base.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the profile, facial features, and the smooth contour of the suit and base.
attribute_subject_matter: human figure, likely a historical person
attribute_location_context: No specific context is visible; the sculpture could be placed in an indoor or outdoor urban setting.
